name: PER_ACTION_OCCURRENCES_
description: This table defines the action occurrences for an action.

columns.Name: ACTION_OCCURRENCE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key. Uniquely identifies a document of record.

columns.Name: ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ACTIONS_B table.

columns.Name: ACTION_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to PER_ACTION_REASONS_B table.

columns.Name: ACTION_DATE
columns.Comments: Date of occurance of action.

columns.Name: SUBMITTED_BY
columns.Comments: Indicates the user who submitted the action.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: FREEZE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the Deferred data freeze start date (defaulted to End of time).

columns.Name: FREEZE_UNTIL_DATE
columns.Comments: Represents the Deferred data freeze until date (defaulted to Start of Time).

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Entity Type stores the parent object of a transactional entity.

columns.Name: ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores Surrogate key of the entity type

columns.Name: PARENT_ENTITY_TYPE
columns.Comments: Entity Type stores the parent object of a transactional entity.

columns.Name: PARENT_ENTITY_KEY_ID
columns.Comments: Stores Surrogate key of the entity type

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Identifier of Enterprise, used for multi-tenancy partitioning. Foreign key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS.

columns.Name: ACTION_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: Denormalized information. Stores the Action Type used in creation of this row

columns.Name: AUDIT_ACTION_TYPE_
columns.Comments: Actione Type - have values like INSERT, UPDATE and DELETE.

columns.Name: AUDIT_CHANGE_BIT_MAP_
columns.Comments: Used to store a bit map of 1's and 0s for each row. 1 will be stored if the value has changed and 0 will be stored if the value hasn't.

columns.Name: AUDIT_IMPERSONATOR_
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the impersonator who last updated the row.

columns.Name: PROPOSED_ACTION_ID
columns.Comments: PROPOSED_ACTION_ID

columns.Name: PROPOSED_REASON_ID
columns.Comments: PROPOSED_REASON_ID

columns.Name: PROPOSED_ACTION_TYPE
columns.Comments: PROPOSED_ACTION_TYPE

columns.Name: PROPOSED_WORKER_TYPE
columns.Comments: PROPOSED_WORKER_TYPE

columns.Name: PROPOSED_START_DATE
columns.Comments: PROPOSED_START_DATE

columns.Name: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: LEGAL_ENTITY_ID

columns.Name: POSITION_ID
columns.Comments: Position ID for Combined Employment and Position Change action

columns.Name: BUSINESS_UNIT_ID
columns.Comments: Business Unit ID for Combined Employment and Position Change action

columns.Name: HOW_TO_PROCESS
columns.Comments: Choice of position action for Combined Employment and Position Change action
